top_picks.thesis: WDC is one of the highest-quality setups in our universe right now with a score of 100. The stock is in a clean Stage 2 uptrend with price above its MA50, MA150, and MA200. The RS line is at new highs — this stock is leading the market, not just riding it. Fundamentals back it up: EPS +483% and revenue +46% YoY — the kind of numbers that attract institutional money. Trade setup: entry at $577.19, stop at $531.01 (–8%), target $692.63 (+20%). Risk/reward: 2.5:1.
key_strengths: confirmed Stage 2 uptrend (price $577.19 above MA50 $420 and MA200 $240)
Relative Strength line at new highs vs S&P 500 — institutional accumulation leading price
EPS growing 483% year-over-year — institutional-grade earnings momentum
revenue up 46% YoY confirming earnings growth is real and sustained
what_to_watch: RSI at 73 — momentum healthy, watch for RSI to stay above 50 on any pullback
price is just 2.8% from 52-week high at $594.11 — that level is key resistance/breakout point

top_picks.thesis: AMD is one of the highest-quality setups in our universe right now with a score of 98.9. It's in a confirmed Stage 2 uptrend and has formed a VCP with 5 contractions (tightest: 1.7%) — the textbook pre-breakout coiling that Minervini built his career on. Fundamentals back it up: EPS +91% and revenue +38% YoY — the kind of numbers that attract institutional money. Key risk to monitor: recent news flow negative — monitor sentiment shift. Trade setup: entry at $508.30, stop at $467.64 (–8%), target $609.97 (+20%). Risk/reward: 2.5:1.
key_strengths: confirmed Stage 2 uptrend (price $508.3 above MA50 $354 and MA200 $244)
VCP pattern with 5 contractions, tightest pullback 1.7% — classic coiled-spring setup
extremely tight base (sub-5% contraction) — high-velocity breakout potential
RS line rising 21.0% in last 4 weeks — outperforming the market
key_risks: recent news flow negative — monitor sentiment shift
what_to_watch: RSI at 63 — momentum healthy, watch for RSI to stay above 50 on any pullback
price is 6.3% from 52-week high — needs to reclaim that level to confirm breakout
